product_overview: Al-HAI Cashier is an offline-first, enterprise-grade Point of Sale (POS) application for retail cashiers with optional Supabase cloud sync, multi-language support including RTL, thermal printer integration, barcode scanning and role-based access control.
core_goals: Enable fast, reliable retail checkout operations that work 100% offline with seamless background sync to Supabase when online.
Provide a complete cashier workflow: authentication, product scanning/search, cart management, multi-method payments, receipts and returns.
Support store-level operations: inventory, purchases, customer accounts/ledgers, shifts/cash reconciliation and reporting.
Offer enterprise features for deployments: printer/payment device integration, user roles/permissions, encrypted local storage and backups.
Deliver a localized, accessible UI (7 languages, RTL) with keyboard shortcuts and performant UX across mobile, tablet and desktop.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Phone + OTP login flow (OTP via SMS/WhatsApp or dev-mode display) with post-login store selection and session management.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter phone number -> Submit phone number -> Receive OTP (dev mode: displayed on screen) -> Enter OTP code received via SMS -> Verify OTP to complete login -> See /store-select -> Select store from available stores -> Navigate to /pos

Navigate to /login -> Enter phone number -> Submit phone number -> Supabase OTP request fails due to network -> See error message 'Unable to request OTP' -> Tap Retry -> If retry fails, show offline dev-mode instructions

features.name: Onboarding
features.description: First-time user onboarding with feature highlights and an option to complete or skip before login.
user_flows: Navigate to /onboarding -> Swipe through onboarding pages -> View feature highlights on each page -> Tap 'Get Started' -> Navigate to /login
Navigate to /onboarding -> Swipe through onboarding pages -> App fails to load an onboarding asset -> See error placeholder -> Tap Retry -> Tap 'Skip' -> Navigate to /login

features.name: Point of Sale (POS)
features.description: Main checkout screen with product browsing, search, barcode scanning, cart management, quick-sale and hold invoices.
user_flows: Navigate to /pos -> Browse products by category -> Search products by name or barcode -> Tap product to add to cart -> Adjust quantity in cart -> Apply discounts -> Hold invoice for later -> Proceed to payment -> Navigate to /pos/payment

Navigate to /pos -> Search products by name -> See 'No products found' -> Navigate to /pos/barcode-scanner -> Scan barcode with barcode gun -> See 'Product not found' -> Navigate to /products/quick-add -> Fill quick add form -> Save product -> Add new product to cart

features.name: Payment Processing
features.description: Multi-method payment overlay supporting cash, card, mixed/split payments and customer credit with receipt printing.
user_flows: From /pos navigate to /pos/payment -> Select payment method (cash) -> Enter cash amount tendered -> View change due calculation -> Complete payment and print receipt -> Navigate to /pos/receipt

From /pos navigate to /pos/payment -> Select payment method (card) -> Attempt card terminal payment -> See error 'Payment device not connected' -> Select payment method (cash) -> Enter cash amount -> Complete payment

features.name: Sales History
features.description: View and filter past sales, inspect details, reprint receipts and process exchanges or split receipts.
user_flows: Navigate to /sales -> View list of past sales -> Apply date filter -> Tap a sale -> Navigate to /sales/:id -> Tap 'Reprint receipt' -> Navigate to /sales/reprint -> Confirm print

Navigate to /sales -> Apply date filter with no results -> See message 'No sales for selected period' -> Tap a sale from the list (if available) -> Attempt reprint -> See printer error 'Printer unavailable' -> Show retry option

features.name: Customer Management
features.description: Manage customer list, view account balances and ledgers, create transactions, apply interest and generate invoices.
user_flows: Navigate to /customers -> View customer list -> Search customers by name or phone -> Tap a customer -> Navigate to /customers/:id -> View customer account balance -> Open ledger -> Navigate to /customers/ledger/:id -> Create manual transaction -> Navigate to /customer-accounts/transaction -> Save transaction

Navigate to /customers -> Search customers by name -> See 'Customer not found' -> Tap 'Create new customer' -> Fill required fields -> Submit -> See validation errors for missing phone -> Correct fields -> Save customer

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: Track and adjust stock levels: add/remove stock, transfer between locations, perform stock-takes and record wastage with low-stock alerts.
user_flows: Navigate to /inventory -> View inventory list with stock levels -> Select product -> Navigate to /inventory/add -> Enter quantity to add -> Confirm add -> See updated stock level in list

Navigate to /inventory -> Select product -> Navigate to /inventory/transfer -> Enter transfer quantity and destination location -> Submit transfer -> See validation error 'Invalid destination' -> Correct destination -> Submit transfer successfully

features.name: Product Management
features.description: Quickly add products, edit prices, manage categories and print barcode/price labels.
user_flows: Navigate to /products -> Tap 'Quick Add' -> Navigate to /products/quick-add -> Fill product name, price and barcode -> Save product -> See new product in /products catalog

Navigate to /products -> Select product -> Navigate to /products/print-barcode -> Select label options -> Tap 'Print' -> On web platform see print preview (printer stub) -> Show message 'Printing preview available; physical printing disabled on web'

features.name: Shift Management
features.description: Open and close shifts, record cash in/out and view daily summaries and shift discrepancies.
user_flows: Navigate to /shifts -> Tap 'Open Shift' -> Navigate to /shifts/open -> Enter opening cash amount -> Confirm -> Perform sales during shift -> Navigate to /shifts/close -> Enter closing cash and reconcile -> Navigate to /shifts/daily-summary -> View summary

Navigate to /shifts -> Tap 'Close Shift' -> Navigate to /shifts/close -> Enter closing cash and system totals -> See discrepancy alert -> Require manager approval -> Manager navigates to /settings/users to approve or resolve discrepancy

features.name: Reports & Analytics
features.description: Generate built-in and custom reports (sales, payment breakdown, inventory) with date filters and export options.
user_flows: Navigate to /reports -> Select report type 'Daily Sales' -> Choose date range -> Generate report -> View payment breakdown by method -> Export report data

Navigate to /reports -> Open custom report builder (/reports/custom) -> Add multiple complex filters -> Generate report -> See 'Report generation failed' due to heavy query -> Tap Retry or reduce filters

features.name: Settings & Configuration
features.description: Configure store details, tax rules (ZATCA), receipt templates, printers, payment devices, keyboard shortcuts, users/permissions and backups.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Tap 'Store' -> Navigate to /settings/store -> Update store name and address -> Save changes -> Tap 'Tax' -> Navigate to /settings/tax -> Update VAT settings -> Save
Navigate to /settings -> Tap 'Backup' -> Navigate to /settings/backup -> Initiate database backup -> See 'Backup failed: insufficient storage' -> Free up space -> Retry backup -> Backup completes

features.name: Returns & Refunds
features.description: Process returns and refunds by locating original sale, selecting items, choosing reasons and issuing refunds or exchanges.
user_flows: Navigate to /returns -> Search original sale -> Select items to return -> Choose return reason -> Process refund to original payment method -> Print return receipt

Navigate to /returns -> Search original sale -> Select items to return -> Enter refund amount greater than original -> See validation error 'Refund exceeds original amount' -> Adjust refund amount to valid value

features.name: Purchases & Receiving
features.description: Create purchase requests and receive goods with quantity verification and confirmation of received items.
user_flows: Navigate to /purchases/receiving -> Open receiving screen -> Select purchase order or create receiving record -> Enter quantities received -> Confirm receive -> Update inventory levels
Navigate to /purchases/receiving -> Select supplier -> Add received items -> Enter negative or invalid quantity -> See validation error 'Invalid quantity' -> Correct quantity and confirm receive

features.name: Offers & Promotions
features.description: Manage active offers, coupon codes and bundle deals to apply discounts at checkout.
user_flows: Navigate to /offers/active -> View list of active offers -> Tap an offer to edit -> Activate or deactivate offer -> Save changes -> Offer reflects at /pos during checkout
Navigate to /offers/coupon -> Create coupon with invalid expiry date -> See validation error 'Expiry date must be in the future' -> Correct expiry date -> Save coupon

known_limitations.issue: App is offline-first with local SQLite database; most API calls go through Supabase sync
known_limitations.impact: All data operations work offline, sync happens in background when online

known_limitations.issue: Printer services use stub implementations on web platform
known_limitations.impact: Physical printing not available on web, only preview

known_limitations.issue: Authentication requires Supabase backend for OTP verification
